seoTitle: Stafford Heights vs Stalworth — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stafford Heights and Stalworth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Stafford Heights vs Stalworth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stafford Heights and Stalworth.
heading: Stafford Heights vs Stalworth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stafford Heights, Queensland and Stalworth, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stalworth has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Stafford Heights (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stafford Heights or Stalworth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stafford Heights has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Stalworth scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stafford Heights scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Stalworth scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stafford Heights or Stalworth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stalworth has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.37% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
